widgets_values: grossup, an extreme close-up of a surreal and unsettling food item resting on a surface. A standard, sesame-seed-topped hamburger bun sits atop a grotesque, blue slimy fleshy mass that appears like a raw internal organ, composed of vascular, organic-looking tissue. This blue, pulsating-looking mound is textured with intricate purple vein patterns, numerous dark pits, and a small, hollow opening at one end. A thin, viscous, light-green slime-like fluid leaks from beneath the mass onto the surface. The background is a flat, muted teal, which emphasizes the visceral, biological, and disturbing appearance of the central object. 90s animation, cell animation, ren & stimpy style.

subgraphs.name: Sharpen
subgraphs.description: Sharpens image details using a GPU fragment shader for enhanced clarity.

subgraphs.name: Brightness and Contrast
subgraphs.description: Adjusts image brightness and contrast using a real-time GPU fragment shader.

subgraphs.name: Color Balance
subgraphs.description: Balances colors across shadows, midtones, and highlights using a real-time GPU fragment shader.
